raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "a must be a mutable integer object",
    "b must be an integer"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "a is modified to be the bitwise AND of its original value and b",
    "the result of the bitwise AND operation is returned"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "a is not an integer and does not support bitwise AND operation",
    "b is not an integer",
    "a is an integer and b is a very large integer",
    "a is an integer and b is a very small integer"
  ]
}
```
